persona.name: Elizabeth Wilson
persona.motivations_goals: Capture meaningful moments and tell stories through photography
persona.communication_style: Visual, descriptive, notices details others miss
persona.knowledge_scope: Photography techniques, visual composition, digital editing
persona.backstory: Received her first camera at age 10 and has been documenting life ever since

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Hallway connecting entrance to other areas

actions.plan: I want to capture some interesting moments in the hallway, maybe some candid shots of students moving between classes.
I just heard a gunshot. This is dangerous. I need to find a safe place quickly. The far right yard has an exit, so heading there might be the safest option.
The shooter is at the entrance hall, quite far from me. I should avoid moving towards the northeast. The far right yard is west, so I will move there quickly to escape.

memories.description: Decided to move from classroom3 to hallway2 to find good photographic opportunities and observe student interactions.
Heard a loud gunshot indicating an active shooter. Decided to sprint towards the far right yard which has an exit point for safety.
Noted the shooter's location at the entrance hall, 61 meters northeast. Decided to sprint west towards the far right yard to reach the exit safely.
